fetched_via: curl + python (regex-strip HTML) + python 句切生成 lines.txt
issues_encountered: 源 HTML 抽取后正文亦落在单行，subagent 自行用 Python 按句号 + 大写字母切分生成 anth-sub-agents-lines.txt（340 行），所有锚点已用 grep -n 在该 lines 文件中反查通过

cross_check_anchors.verbatim: Subagents are specialized AI assistants that handle specific types of tasks.
Each subagent runs in its own context window with a custom system prompt, specific tool access, and independent permissions.

Subagents help you: Preserve context by keeping exploration and implementation out of your main conversation Enforce constraints by limiting which tools a subagent can use Reuse configurations across projects with user-level subagents Specialize behavior with focused system prompts for specific domains Control costs by routing tasks to faster, cheaper models like Haiku
Explore and Plan skip your CLAUDE.md files and the parent session's git status to keep research fast and inexpensive.
This prevents infinite nesting (subagents cannot spawn other subagents) while still gathering necessary context.
Subagents cannot spawn other subagents, so Agent(agent_type) has no effect in subagent definitions.
The memory field gives the subagent a persistent directory that survives across conversations.
Foreground subagents block the main conversation until complete.
